*** Add File: RLOS_design_synthesis.md
+# Unified Rhetorical‑Linguistic OS Design – Comprehensive Synthesis
+
+## Introduction
+
+The Rhetorical‑Linguistic Operating System (RLOS) is an ambitious framework that combines linguistics, rhetoric, semiotics and computing. It treats language not simply as text but as a **living ecosystem** of signs, sounds, gestures and visual symbols. The theoretical foundation emphasises *semiotic stratification* – a layered structure in which linguistic phenomena (from sounds to discourse) are processed in interconnected modules【33635101037775†L33-L68】【33635101037775†L253-L261】. Unlike conventional natural‑language systems that follow a one‑way pipeline, RLOS advocates a *plexus* or **hypergraph architecture** where modules communicate bidirectionally and context flows up and down the stack【33635101037775†L33-L68】. This synthesis consolidates ideas from multiple AI responses (Grok, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot) and supporting documents.
